Petition To Determine Beneficiaries Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case #290033 (Estate of Lai W. Huie).

Appearances: David King for Jane Huie and Arthur Huie. John Lofton for George Huie (Petitioner/Respondent).

Mr. King stated that the entire matter had not settled, that there was an issue with regard to the parties paying there share of the capital gains tax due on the North Point property and that he was prepared to go forward. Mr. Lofton stated that he would like to have further discussions. The parties informed the Court that the matter would take 7 days for trial. The Court signed the order referring the matters to Department 206 to be set for trial.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.

Petition To Determine Beneficiaries Of Trust
Off Calendar May-30-2007 Continued To Aug-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Lofton appearing for George Huie, petitioner/respondent. David King appearing for Arthur Huie, Jane Huie-Land and Lisa Yip, petitioners in the petition to recover trust property. Andrew Schultz appearing for trustee Bertha Joung. Mr. Lofton intented to respond to the 850 petition. Mr. King requested to consolidate the case for trial. Mr. Lofton's client would not stipulate to consolidation. Court will have to determine if there is a valid Will first. Ms. Joung has file for Probate of Will. Hearing is set on 6/20. The Will will come up in the probate proceeding and the Court is not in any position to make the determination now. Mr. King will file Will Contest in the probate proceeding. The trust petitions are continued to 8/15 for status on Will Contest.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Tom Bradley.
